name: promptly-monorepo
description: Promptly - AI-powered Hinge prompt generator (Full-stack monorepo)

scripts.build: npm run build:mobile && npm run build:api
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd mobile && npm install && cd ../api && npm install
scripts.lint: npm run lint:mobile && npm run lint:api
scripts.test: npm run test:mobile && npm run test:api

author: Promptly Team
